description: The 11 PAIs (Principal Adverse Impact indicators) material for data-centre developer assessment under SFDR. PAI numbering follows Annex I of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2022/1288. PAI 3 (GHG intensity of investees) is reframed under PB's developer-as-investee framing as 'developer's own GHG intensity per unit revenue or per unit IT load'. PAI 6 (energy consumption intensity for high-impact climate sectors) is treated as material for data centres despite NACE classification ambiguity. Used by SFDR criteria 3 (PAI policy) and 4 (DNSH).

material_pais.name: GHG intensity of investees (PB framing: developer's own GHG intensity per unit revenue / per unit IT load)
Share of non-renewable energy consumption and production
Energy consumption intensity per high-impact climate sector
material_pais.pb_framing_note: Treated as material for data centres despite NACE classification ambiguity

material_pais.name: Hazardous waste and radioactive waste ratio
Violations of UN Global Compact principles and OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises
Lack of processes and compliance mechanisms to monitor compliance with UNGC / OECD guidelines

source: Annex I of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2022/1288 (consolidated 20/02/2023), with PB-specific materiality scoping for data-centre developers.
